pr.title: Enhance research.js and index.html for improved query handling and UI…
pr.body:
… feedback

- Introduced tier-based query ordering in research.js to prioritize candidate queries based on defined tiers, enhancing search accuracy.
- Implemented a timeout mechanism for sold data fetching to prevent blocking active results, improving user experience during data retrieval.
- Updated index.html with new CSS styles for research progress indicators, enhancing visual feedback during the research process.
- Refined condition selection options in the UI for better clarity and user guidance on item conditions.
pr.author: Goodfindsstl
